scripts.build: npm run build -w @file-reader/shared && npm run build -w @file-reader/server && npm run build -w @file-reader/author && npm run build -w @file-reader/viewer
scripts.author: node scripts/encrypt.js
scripts.viewer: npm run build -w @file-reader/shared && npm run start -w @file-reader/viewer
scripts.dist: npm run build -w @file-reader/shared && npm run dist -w @file-reader/viewer
scripts.dist:win: npm run build -w @file-reader/shared && npm run dist:win -w @file-reader/viewer
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build -w @file-reader/shared && npm run dist:linux -w @file-reader/viewer
scripts.pack: npm run build -w @file-reader/shared && npm run pack -w @file-reader/viewer
